summary: Frontend-only testing of Emergent VPN static marketing site (Home, Privacy, Delete-Account). All 13 review-request checks passed. SEO assets (robots.txt, sitemap.xml, favicon.svg) reachable and valid. Open Graph meta tags present. All data-testid selectors found. Responsive at 375px viewport (no horizontal scroll on any of the 3 pages). FAQ accordion expands. Hero/Header/Footer/Support/Delete email links all correct. Footer copyright dynamically shows 2026.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx (~462 lines) is approaching the 700-line guideline limit due to inline data arrays (FEATURES/STEPS/FAQS). Consider extracting these to /lib/content.js or splitting into section components for maintainability.
Home.jsx line 262 uses an O(n^2) lookup `FEATURES.indexOf(FEATURES.find(...))` inside the .map() — simply use the map's index argument (i) instead.

robots.txt at the public URL is being served by Cloudflare with managed content prepended (AI-train rules etc.); the original file's `Sitemap:` line is still present at the end so it still passes validation, but the served file differs from the source — this is environment-level, not a code bug.
Sitemap.xml uses hard-coded production domain `emergentvpn.com` — fine for the production deploy, but if multiple environments are needed, consider templating.

Open Graph image `https://emergentvpn.com/og-image.svg` is referenced but the file isn't in /app/frontend/public — link will 404 in production (only favicon.svg exists). Recommend adding og-image.svg or pointing og:image to favicon.svg.
test_credentials: None required (static site, no auth, no backend)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is a 3-page static React SPA. Public URL: https://vpn-protection-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. All data-testids used by the review request are wired correctly. Only outstanding minor finding: og:image points to /og-image.svg which is not present in /app/frontend/public (only favicon.svg exists).
